scripts.ios:booted: DEVICE_ID=$(xcrun simctl list devices booted | awk -F'[()]' '/Booted/{print $2; exit}') && (xcrun simctl uninstall "$DEVICE_ID" com.juancabral12.jsm-testing || true) && npx expo run:ios --no-build-cache --device "$DEVICE_ID"
scripts.ios:fresh: rm -rf ios/Pods ios/Podfile.lock ios/build .expo ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/duolingoclone-* ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/vocalingo-* && npm install && npx expo install --fix && npx expo prebuild --clean --platform ios && npx pod-install ios && DEVICE_ID=$(xcrun simctl list devices booted | awk -F'[()]' '/Booted/{print $2; exit}') && (xcrun simctl uninstall "$DEVICE_ID" com.juancabral12.jsm-testing || true) && npx expo run:ios --no-build-cache --device "$DEVICE_ID"
scripts.ios:logs: xcrun simctl spawn booted log stream --style compact --level debug --predicate 'process == "vocalingo"'
scripts.ios:diagnose: APP=$(xcrun simctl get_app_container booted com.juancabral12.jsm-testing) && echo "$APP" && plutil -p "$APP/Info.plist" | sed -n '1,140p' && file "$APP/vocalingo" && xcrun simctl launch --terminate-running-process booted com.juancabral12.jsm-testing && /usr/bin/log show --predicate 'process == "vocalingo"' --last 2m --style compact | tail -120
